name: Charles Behrman
text: Pooja Bartake was awesome to work with! As a first-time homebuyer, I had a lot of questions, but Pooja was incredibly knowledgeable and made the entire process feel like a breeze. She has a great sense of humor that kept the stress levels low, yet she was a complete pro when it came to the details. I couldn't have asked for a better guide for my first purchase!
